results.description: Main menu loads with playable UI
Start Game transitions from menu to Overworld
Dialogue overlay opens/closes with UI transition polish
Overworld encounter transitions into Battle scene
Battle scene provides active turn feedback and debug snapshot
Battle hit feedback path executes during enemy attacks
Stabilize ability path executes and updates HP state
results.notes: Expected enemy hit to reduce HP (initial=100, after=100)
results.bug_title: Stabilize ability path executes and updates HP state failed

results.description: Battle completion returns to Overworld with transition feedback
results.notes: Blocked after 120807ms: Battle did not resolve back to Overworld within one 2-minute attempt.
